title: Message/query: text filter and threadRootId filter
description:
Extend MessageFilter in types.rs and Message/query in methods/message.rs:
- Add filter fields: text (full-text search), threadRootId (filter to thread), hasAttachment, after/before (UTCDate range)
- Verify sort options: receivedAt, sentAt
- Fixture tests for text filter and threadRootId filter

Fixture files: tests/fixtures/message_query_*.json
